title: Speaking Interview
description: The examiner asks you questions about yourself and your daily life. Answer naturally and try to give reasons for your answers.

phases.name: Socializing / Basics
questions: How long have you been studying English?
What do you enjoy most about learning English?

phases.name: Current Lifestyle
questions: What's your favourite celebration or festival? Why?
How does your family usually celebrate special occasions?
Do you think traditional celebrations are still important today?
Have you ever experienced a festival or celebration from another culture?
Do you prefer small, family celebrations or big parties? Why?

phases.name: Opinions & Preferences
questions: Do you think it's important to keep traditional celebrations alive in modern society?
Have any traditions changed in your culture that you think is a loss?
What new celebration or tradition do you think future generations might create?
